# Beudox HR - Technical Documentation for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a single-page application (SPA) built with React and TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool. It follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns:

- **Frontend**: React 18 with TypeScript for type safety
- **Routing**: React Router DOM with protected routes and role-based access control
- **State Management**: TanStack Query for server state, React Context for global state
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui component library
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Real-time subscriptions)
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod schema validation
- **Data Fetching**: TanStack Query with optimistic updates

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Authentication Flow
- Supabase handles authentication with JWT tokens
- Protected routes check session validity and user roles
- Password reset and invite flows are handled via URL hash parameters
- Role-based access control implemented with `canAccess` utility function

### Data Flow
- Components use TanStack Query hooks for data fetching
- Mutations trigger optimistic updates and cache invalidation
- Real-time subscriptions for live data updates
- Error boundaries and loading states throughout the app

### Component Structure
- Page components handle routing and layout
- Feature-specific components in dedicated directories
- Shared UI components in `components/ui/`
- Layout components provide consistent navigation and structure

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main application component with routing configuration
- `src/index.css`: Global styles and Tailwind imports

### Authentication & Authorization
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx`: Authentication context and hooks
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based access control logic
- `src/pages/Login.tsx`: Login page component
- `src/pages/SetPassword.tsx`: Password setup for invites/recovery

### Layout & Navigation
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main application layout wrapper
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Sidebar navigation component
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar
- `src/components/layout/UserMenu.tsx`: User dropdown menu

### Key Business Logic Components
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx`: Displays evaluation history with filtering
- `src/components/finance/FinanceSummary.tsx`: Financial dashboard with charts
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`: Reusable employee selection component
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Logo component with variant support

### Utility Libraries
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/format-date.ts`: Date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Access control functions
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts`: Activity logging and categorization
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts`: Leave calculation utilities
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Notification sending logic

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: Database type definitions

## Database Schema Insights

Based on migration files, the database includes:

### Core Entities
- **employees**: User profiles with roles, departments, contact info
- **companies**: Multi-tenant support for different organizations
- **projects**: Project management with team assignments
- **evaluations**: Quarterly performance reviews
- **daily_evaluations**: Daily feedback system
- **leave_requests**: Leave management system
- **payroll_records**: Salary and payroll data
- **monthly_expenses**: Expense tracking

### Supporting Tables
- **departments**: Organizational structure
- **roles**: Permission roles
- **leave_types**: Configurable leave categories
- **evaluation_parameters**: Evaluation criteria
- **hr_policies**: Policy documents
- **job_descriptions**: Position definitions
- **clients**: Client relationship management
- **invoices**: Billing and invoicing

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to companies and departments
- Projects have many-to-many relationship with employees
- Evaluations link employees to evaluators
- Leave requests reference leave types and approval workflows

## Business Logic and Data Flow

### Employee Management
- Employee profiles include personal info, role, department, salary
- Onboarding flow with invite emails and password setup
- Profile updates with avatar upload and validation

### Evaluation System
- Quarterly evaluations: Formal performance reviews with recommendations
- Daily evaluations: Quick feedback between team members
- Timeline view shows evaluation history with role-based visibility
- Scoring system with 1-5 star ratings

### Financial Management
- Payroll calculation with base salary, OT, bonuses, deductions
- Expense tracking by month
- Financial dashboard with trend analysis
- Invoice generation with PDF export

### Leave Management
- Multiple leave types (annual, sick, maternity, etc.)
- Balance calculation and tracking
- Approval workflow with notifications
- Calendar integration for holiday management

### Project Management
- Project creation with team assignment
- Task tracking and progress updates
- Activity logging for project history
- Client association for billing

## Configuration and Environment

### Build Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Vite configuration with React plugin
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Tailwind CSS customization
- `eslint.config.js`: ESLint configuration

### Environment Variables
- `VITE_SUPABASE_URL`: Supabase project URL
- `VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY`: Public Supabase key
- `VITE_SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID`: Project identifier

## Testing Strategy

- **Unit Tests**: Component and utility function testing with Vitest
- **Integration Tests**: Playwright for end-to-end testing
- **Test Setup**: `src/test/setup.ts` for test configuration

## Deployment Considerations

- Built as static SPA deployable to any web server
- Supabase handles backend scaling and database
- Environment-specific builds supported
- CDN-ready static assets

## Security Considerations

- Row Level Security (RLS) policies in Supabase
- JWT token-based authentication
- Role-based access control in application logic
- Input validation with Zod schemas
- Secure password handling via Supabase Auth
